query: bash -c "source ~/hermes-venv/bin/activate && cd /mnt/c/civibbs/v2.5/lib/small/ml && python3 -c \"import importlib.util, sys, tempfile, os, shutil; plugins = [\"atomic_take\", \"atomic_write\", \"create_agent_mailbox\", \"create_multiple_topo_units\", \"create_public_mailbox\", \"create_topo_storage_with_copies\", \"resolve_mail_target\", \"send_shutdown_to_topo_unit\", \"wait_for_mail_arrival\"]; ok = 0; fail = 0; [ (ok := ok + 1, print(f\"  ok: {p}\")) if __import__(\"importlib.util\").util.spec_from_file_location(f\"test_{p}\", f\"{p}/execute.py\") else None for p in plugins]; print(f\"All {len(plugins)} plugins loadable\") 2>&1"
